findings.title: affaan-m/everything-claude-code
findings.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

findings.title: ray-project/ray
findings.description: Ray is an AI compute engine. Ray consists of a core distributed runtime and a set of AI Libraries for accelerating ML workloads.

findings.title: mlflow/mlflow
findings.description: The open source AI engineering platform for agents, LLMs, and ML models. MLflow enables teams of all sizes to debug, evaluate, monitor, and optimize production-quality AI applications while controlling costs and managing access to models and data.

findings.title: emcie-co/parlant
findings.description: The conversational control layer for customer-facing AI agents - Parlant is a context-engineering framework optimized for controlling customer interactions.

findings.title: kvcache-ai/ktransformers
findings.description: A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations

findings.title: NVIDIA/TensorRT-LLM
findings.description: TensorRT LLM provides users with an easy-to-use Python API to define Large Language Models (LLMs) and supports state-of-the-art optimizations to perform inference efficiently on NVIDIA GPUs. TensorRT LLM also contains components to create Python and C++ runtimes that orchestrate the inference execution in a performant way.

findings.title: tensorzero/tensorzero
findings.description: TensorZero is an open-source LLMOps platform that unifies an LLM gateway, observability, evaluation, optimization, and experimentation.

findings.title: krillinai/KrillinAI
findings.description: Video translation and dubbing tool powered by LLMs. The video translator offers 100 language translations and one-click full-process deployment. The video translation output is optimized for platforms like YouTube，TikTok.   AI视频翻译配音工具，100种语言双向翻译，一键部署全流程，可以生抖音，小红书，哔哩哔哩，视频号，TikTok，Youtube等形态的内容成适配

findings.title: Marker-Inc-Korea/AutoRAG
findings.description: AutoRAG: An Open-Source Framework for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Evaluation & Optimization with AutoML-Style Automation

findings.title: SylphAI-Inc/AdalFlow
findings.description: AdalFlow: The library to build & auto-optimize LLM applications.

findings.title: NVIDIA/GenerativeAIExamples
findings.description: Generative AI reference workflows optimized for accelerated infrastructure and microservice architecture.

findings.title: algorithmicsuperintelligence/optillm
findings.description: Optimizing inference proxy for LLMs

findings.title: vllm-project/llm-compressor
findings.description: Transformers-compatible library for applying various compression algorithms to LLMs for optimized deployment with vLLM

findings.title: BBuf/how-to-optim-algorithm-in-cuda
findings.description: how to optimize some algorithm in cuda.

findings.title: lemonade-sdk/lemonade
findings.description: Lemonade helps users discover and run local AI apps by serving optimized LLMs right from their own GPUs and NPUs. Join our discord: https://discord.gg/5xXzkMu8Zk

findings.title: can1357/oh-my-pi
findings.description: ⌥  AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more

findings.title: NVIDIA/Model-Optimizer
findings.description: A unified library of SOTA model optimization techniques like quantization, pruning, distillation, speculative decoding, etc. It compresses deep learning models for downstream deployment frameworks like TensorRT-LLM, TensorRT, vLLM, etc. to optimize inference speed.

findings.title: langfengQ/verl-agent
findings.description: verl-agent is an extension of veRL, designed for training LLM/VLM agents via RL. verl-agent is also the official code for paper "Group-in-Group Policy Optimization for LLM Agent Training"

findings.title: facebookresearch/MobileLLM
findings.description: MobileLLM Optimizing Sub-billion Parameter Language Models for On-Device Use Cases. In ICML 2024.

findings.title: jd-opensource/xllm
findings.description: A high-performance inference engine for LLMs, optimized for diverse AI accelerators.
